process.title: Launch your business in 5 simple steps
process.description: From account creation to product delivery, Kiiako supports you at every step to turn your passion into a profitable business.

1.label: STEP 1
1.title: Free registration
1.description: Create your Kiiako account in seconds. No registration fees, no credit card required.

2.label: STEP 2
2.title: Create your store
2.description: Customize your store with your domain name, add your products, set your prices, and you're ready to sell.

3.label: STEP 3
3.title: Receive your orders
3.description: Your customers discover your products and place orders directly from your professional online store.

4.label: STEP 4
4.title: Collect payments
4.description: Receive payments instantly via Mobile Money. Secure transactions and simplified income management.

5.label: STEP 5
5.title: Assured delivery
5.description: Our integrated delivery system ships your products directly to your customers. You track everything from your dashboard.

items.name: Marie Mumbanza
items.text: Kiiako transformed my business. In 6 months, I tripled my turnover. Integrated delivery and Mobile Money payments make everything so simple. My customers love the fluidity of my online store.

items.name: Jean-Pierre Okonda
items.text: I now sell throughout the DRC thanks to Kiiako's delivery system. Customer support is exceptional, and the dashboard allows me to manage everything easily. I highly recommend this platform.

items.name: Fatou Diallo
items.text: With my custom domain name and multiple shops on Kiiako, I was able to professionalize my image. I now manage over 500 orders a month and my income has exploded.

step1.title: Create your account

step5.title: Launch and sell
step5.description: Share your link and start receiving orders today.

list: 100% free to start, no hidden fees

hero.title: Accept payments from all over Africa
hero.description: Single integration to collect Orange Money, MTN, Moov and Wave in multiple countries. Receive your funds directly on your mobile.

mobileFirst.title: Mobile First Experience
mobileFirst.description: Optimized to pay in 3 clicks on smartphone.

instantConfirmation.title: Instant Confirmation
instantConfirmation.description: No more waiting. Your orders are validated instantly.

security.title: Bank-level Security
security.description: Encrypted transactions protected by operator PIN code.

dashboard.title: Unified Dashboard
dashboard.description: Track your sales in Benin and Senegal on the same screen.

highSuccessRate.title: High Success Rate
highSuccessRate.description: Direct connections to operators to avoid failures.

support.title: Local Support 24/7
support.description: A team that understands African payment realities.

payIn.title: Sell everywhere, get paid locally.
payIn.description: Don't limit yourself to your country. With Kiiako, a customer in Senegal can pay you with Orange Money, and a customer in Benin with MTN. You have nothing to configure: our platform unifies all payment methods in the sub-region for your store.

payOut.title: Transfer your earnings to your mobile in a few clicks.
payOut.description: No more waiting. Withdraw your funds from the Kiiako platform to your Orange Money, Wave or MTN number in just a few clicks, with advanced security.

items.compatible: Compatible with all operators (OM, MoMo, Wave...)

cta.title: Open your store to the world
cta.description: Start selling in Benin, Togo, Ivory Coast and Senegal starting today.

hero.title: Your payment security, our absolute priority
hero.description: Protect your customers with a fully secure banking and Mobile Money payment system. Every transaction is encrypted, verified and validated by our partner Paydunya, guaranteeing complete trust at every step.

features.title: End-to-end secure payments
features.description: Kiiako protects every transaction with clear controls, precise tracking and reliable Paydunya integration.

paydunya.title: Paydunya Integration
paydunya.description: Connect your payments to a recognized partner to guarantee your customers' trust.

ssl.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
ssl.description: Sensitive data is protected throughout the entire payment journey.

validation.title: Automatic Validation
validation.description: Each payment is automatically verified before being confirmed.

antifraud.title: Anti-fraud Protection
antifraud.description: Proactive detection to limit risky transactions.

history.title: Complete History
history.description: Track your transactions and easily find every payment.

reports.title: Clear Reports
reports.description: Analyze your payments with simple and actionable reports.

commitments.title: Security designed for customer trust
commitments.description: We implement simple safeguards to understand and reassure your customers at every step.

items.traceability_description: Each payment leaves a clear trace for fast and transparent tracking.
items.alerts_description: Automatic verifications to limit anomalies and secure operations.
items.experience_description: A simple payment journey while maintaining high security level.

faq.title: Frequent security questions
faq.description: Essential answers to reassure your customers and your team.

protection.title: How is the payment protected?
protection.description: The journey is encrypted and each transaction goes through automatic controls.

anomaly.title: What happens in case of anomaly?
anomaly.description: Suspicious transactions are flagged for verification before confirmation.

history.title: Can I follow the history?
history.description: Yes, the payment history is accessible for quick control.

confirmation.title: Does the customer receive a confirmation?
confirmation.description: A confirmation is sent as soon as the payment is validated.

process.title: How does a secure payment work?

client.title: Customer chooses Mobile Money
client.description: The customer selects their preferred Mobile Money operator (Orange Money, MTN, Moov, etc.) to make the payment.

redirection.title: Secure redirection to Paydunya
redirection.description: The transaction is redirected to the secure Paydunya platform with SSL/TLS encryption.

ussd.title: Payment via USSD on mobile
ussd.description: The customer receives a USSD code on their phone to confirm the payment securely.

confirmation.title: Instant Confirmation
confirmation.description: The payment is confirmed instantly and securely by Paydunya.

validation.title: Order automatically validated
validation.description: The order is automatically validated and you receive a notification. The customer also receives their confirmation.

cta.title: Protect your customers starting today
cta.description: Offer your customers a 100% secure payment experience with Kiiako and Paydunya.

hero.title: Sell your digital creations
hero.description: Sell ebooks, courses, music, software and more. Instant automatic delivery.

features.title: Sell and deliver your digital products easily

upload.title: Upload files up to 2GB

formats.title: Multiple formats supported

delivery.title: Automatic email delivery
delivery.description: Your customers instantly receive their download link by email after purchase.

security.title: Secure download links
security.description: Anti-piracy protection with secure links and download limit per purchase.

antipiracy.title: Anti-piracy protection
antipiracy.description: Advanced security system to protect your creations from unauthorized download.

updates.title: Automatic updates
updates.description: Update your files and all your customers automatically receive the new version.

types.title: Sell any type of digital content
